message:
bd-1av0.10: add 91 Node.js shim integration tests

Cross-shim interop tests verifying that node:os, node:path, node:crypto,
node:buffer, node:events, and node:url work correctly together. Includes
real extension pattern replays, error path coverage, performance stress
tests, bare vs prefixed import equivalence checks, and complex multi-step
integration scenarios.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
